name: propcheck
purpose: Property-test scaffolder: from a function and a stated invariant (roundtrip/idempotent/oracle/never-raises), generate a visible, committable hypothesis property suite, and run it to report the shrunk counterexample as structured JSON. Finds boundary bugs example-based tests miss.
reach_for_me_when: you have a pure function with an invariant (roundtrip, idempotent, matches a reference) worth testing exhaustively
you suspect a boundary/off-by-one bug example tests won't catch
you want a committed property suite that runs forever in CI, not a one-shot check

commands.name: new
commands.summary: Generate a hypothesis property test file for an invariant

commands.name: run
commands.summary: Run a property file; report counterexamples as JSON (exit 1 on failure)
